hooks.command: command -v wsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && wsh badge bell-exclamation --color '#e0b956' --priority 20 --beep || true
command -v wsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && wsh badge message-question --color '#e0b956' --priority 20 --beep || true
command -v wsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && wsh badge check --color '#58c142' --priority 10 || true
command -v wsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && wsh badge message-question --color '#e0b956' --priority 20 --beep || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -Eq '(^|&&|;)[[:space:]]*cd[[:space:]]+[^&;]*(&&|;)' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"cd-compound command blocked. The Bash working directory persists across calls and bare cd defeats the permission allowlist. Use an absolute path or git -C <dir>, or run cd as its own separate Bash call."}}' || true
